address_prompt_full: Please send the full Texas service address, including the street address, city, and ZIP code, and I will check it for you.
address_prompt_city_zip: Please send the Texas city and ZIP code so I can check the correct service address.
address_prompt_street: Please send the full street number and street name for the Texas service address.
address_prompt_unit: If this is an apartment, unit, suite, or lot address, please include the unit number too.
address_prompt_corrected_full: Please send the full correct Texas service address and I will check it again.
address_ambiguous_intro: I found a few close matches for that Texas service address. Please choose the exact one.
candidate_selection_prompt: Reply with the number that matches your address, or send the full correct Texas service address if none of these are right.
candidate_selection_retry: Please reply with the number that matches your address, or send the full correct Texas service address if none of these are right.
candidate_selection_no_match: Those addresses do not match. Please send the full correct Texas service address and I will check it again.
address_confirmed: I found this Texas service address:\n{{normalized_address}}
usage_summary: For this address, estimated electricity usage is about {{estimated_usage_summary.average_monthly_kwh}} kWh per month on average and {{estimated_usage_summary.annual_total_kwh}} kWh per year.
best_plan_summary: Based on this address and usage, the best current option I found is {{current_best_plan.provider}} - {{current_best_plan.plan_name}} at {{current_best_plan.rate}}{{current_best_plan.rate_unit}} with a base rate of {{current_best_plan.base_rate}}{{current_best_plan.base_rate_unit}} for {{current_best_plan.contract_length}}.
top_plan_table_intro: Here are the current plan options I found for this address, sorted from lowest rate to highest:
destination_cta: You can review this address and its current plan details here:\n{{personalized_energy_url}}
self_select_redirect: If you want to review the current plans for this address yourself, you can continue here:\n{{personalized_energy_url}}
monitoring_cta: Texas electricity prices can change. I recommend {{recommended_frequency}} monitoring so I can keep watching this address for a better option.
lookup_retry: I still need the full Texas service address before I can finish this check. Please send the street address, city, and ZIP code.
plan_lookup_unavailable: I confirmed the address, but I am not seeing current plan details for it right now. You can still review this address here:\n{{personalized_energy_url}}
new_best_plan_alert: I found a new best plan for your Texas address. You can review the current details here:\n{{personalized_energy_url}}
